name: AutoFactory AI provider
description: Selects the Phase 1 agent execution backend. Read natively by the runtime; defaults to 'anthropic' when this flag is absent. Provisioned off (serves 'anthropic'). Variations: 'vega' (LaunchDarkly-hosted) and 'cursor' (Cursor agents via @cursor/sdk — needs CURSOR_API_KEY and the checkout+npm-ci workflow, not the plain drop-in template).
